message:
test(handoff): add pure-function tests improving coverage to 83.8%

Add tests for previously uncovered functions:
- singleLine: string whitespace normalization
- compactList: list formatting with limit and truncation
- MarshalYAML: handoff YAML serialization
- WriteToPath: custom path writing with parent dir creation

Coverage improvements: compactList 12.5%→93.8%, MarshalYAML 0%→100%,
WriteToPath 0%→82.4%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
